---
title: "MIN HE"
image: images/hemin_2026.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: MHE009@e.ntu.edu.sg
      href: mailto:MHE009@e.ntu.edu.sg
    - icon: github
      text: mhe009
      href: https://github.com/mhe009
---

::: {#hero-heading}

My research interests lie in multimodal, large-scale models, machine learning, visual language navigation, and embodied intelligence.

## Background

- 2026-Present: Master of Science, Nanyang Technological University, specializing in Machine Learning.

- 2021-2025: Bachelor of Engineering, Chongqing University of Technology, majoring in Computer Science and Technology.

:::
